actions.text:
Hi David,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm very interested in building the Fintech Compliance Dashboard for NexGen Financial. I'd be happy to review the NDA and get started. Could you share any additional requirements or timeline details?

Looking forward to collaborating.

Best regards,
Jordan Mitchell
